title: Pan-Seared Brazilian Hake with Caramelized Onions
description: A keto-friendly dish featuring pan-seared hake fillets topped with caramelized onions and served with a side of skillet-roasted vegetables.

ingredients.name: Skillet-roasted vegetables (bell peppers, zucchini, cherry tomatoes)

instructions: Season the hake fillets with the Brazilian-style seasoning blend.
Heat 1 tablespoon of avocado oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the hake fillets and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast for an additional 5-7 minutes.
Meanwhile, caramelize the onions by cooking them in a skillet over low heat for 20-25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Skillet-roast the vegetables by cooking them in a skillet with 1 tablespoon of avocado oil over medium heat for 5-7 minutes, or until tender.
Serve the pan-seared hake fillets topped with caramelized onions and a side of skillet-roasted vegetables.
